message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classBackgroundColor White
skinparam classBorderColor Black
skinparam arrowColor Black

class BattlerOrder
class TurnSystem
class BattleFlow
class BattleContext
class PlayerMainTactics
class Player
class PassiveProperty
class ActiveTargetResult
class InvocationContext
class ITargetable
class TargetSelection
class AIInvocationContext
class TurnContext
class Battler
class TP
class Attribute
class Tolerance
class HP
class MP
class PassiveEffect
class ActiveEffect
class BattleEvent
class ActiveProperty
class VisualEffectContext
class ActiveTargetRange
class VisualEffect
class PassiveEffectManager
class BattleEventHandler
class ActiveTargetFilter
class Ability

TurnSystem <|-- BattlerOrder
BattleFlow <|-- TurnSystem
BattleContext <|-- BattleFlow
BattleContext "1" o-- PlayerMainTactics
PlayerMainTactics <|-- Player
BattleContext <-- Player
Player o-- PassiveProperty : PartySkill
ActiveTargetResult <|-- ITargetable
TargetSelection <|-- ITargetable
AIInvocationContext <|-- InvocationContext
Battler <|-- ITargetable
Battler --> TargetSelection
Battler --> InvocationContext
Battler --> AIInvocationContext
Battler --> TurnContext
Battler --> Ability
Battler --> PassiveEffectManager
PassiveProperty o-- Ability : PassiveSkill
Ability --> TP
Ability --> Attribute
Ability --> Tolerance
Ability --> HP
Ability --> MP
PassiveEffect <-- Ability
ActiveEffect <-- Ability
BattleEvent <|-- ActiveEffect
BattleEvent <|-- PassiveEffect
ActiveProperty o-- ActiveEffect : ActiveEffect?
ActiveProperty --> ActiveTargetRange
VisualEffectContext o-- ActiveEffect
VisualEffectContext --> VisualEffect
BattleEventHandler <|-- ActiveEffect
ActiveTargetFilter <|-- ActiveEffect

@enduml
